features: Ultra fine mist spray pattern distributes water evenly - it provides the right amount of water to mildly saturate the hair without getting gunked like the old kinds, refreshing curls or taming a bed-head in the mornings.

Continuous Spray - Produces a stream of sustained mist that lasts a few seconds, allowing large areas to be covered quickly and easily. Besides, the ergonomic design reduces hand fatigue compared to traditional trigger and finger tip sprayers.
360 Degree Spraying Option - you can even spray with the bottle upside down without leakage or loss of prime, thus all areas can be reached.
Airless - No contamination - long shelf life - not any odor with the bottle if not being used in a few days.

Important Notice - In order to ensure the normal work of the product, we will carry out sampling tests on it. There may be some water in some bottles, please do not mind. If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
description: Product Description ***Important Note*** 1.Some buyers misunderstand the mean of the "Continuous", we hope you can understand that our bottle is not a perpetual motion machine. It will produce a stream of sustained mist that lasts 2 seconds under one pumping. 2.If unfortunately the bottle does get clogged, please be advised to try fill it with diluted vinegar and spray the vinegar all out to see if the clogging inside the nozzle would get dissolved. 3. Please be sure to change water frequently. Leaving the water in the bottle for a long time might lead to smells developed in the bottle. 4.If unfortunately the smell does develop, please be advised to fill it with soap water or other detergents and be sure to spray the detergents out. This way, the detergents would go through the nozzle and effectively clean the smell in the nozzle as well as in the bottle. 5.Do not fill high-temperature liquids, otherwise the bottle may not work properly. 6.In order to ensure the normal work of the product, we will carry out sampling tests on it. There may be some water in some bottles, please do not mind. If you have any problems with the bottle, please feel free to contact. Super Fine and Lasting Mist No worries of over-soaking your hair with our spray bottle! Its 0.3mm nozzle delivers fine mist without over-wetting your hair. Its advanced spraying system to ensure that the mist would last about 3-5s each spray. You can prolong the spray by pulling the trigger. Effortless Pressing Our bottle is implemented with precise spring to ensure effortless pumping. Glossy and Durable PET You'll love how it feels in your hand! Made of durable PET, it's both functional and stylish-looking. Would go well with different kinds of home decoration style. Product Specification Material: PET (Polyethylene terephthalate) Size: 7.8 × 2.1in (198 × 53mm) Color: Black Weight: 3.4oz (99g) Volume: 5.4oz/160ml Spray duration: 3-5 seconds per pressing. Press a few times and hold the trigger and it will spray for a longer period.
